headline: Bing Bong McBoing Installs Trampoline Floor In Living Room, Calls It 'Active Seating'
summary: Guests now bounce uncontrollably during dinner conversations, which are 'unintentionally dramatic.'
fullBody: Bing Bong McBoing has replaced his living room floor with a giant trampoline. 'Sitting is passive. Bouncing is engagement,' McBoing explained. Dinner guests now bounce uncontrollably, making conversations 'physically challenging' and 'emotionally heightened.' 'I told my boss I quit, but I think I just bounced weirdly,' one guest said. McBoing is now considering a 'ceiling pool' for 'vertical swimming.'
